channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Nvidia posts record $81.6 billion quarterly revenue on AI spending
item.description: Chip giant Nvidia posted record quarterly revenue of $81.6 billion, blowing past Wall Street forecasts as insatiable demand for its artificial intelligence hardware powered another blockbuster quarter. [Intel, Nvidia]

item.title: Nvidia Q1 revenues hit record $82B, up 85% year-over-year as AI demand shows no signs of cooling
item.description: Nvidia's dominance in AI chips could reshape tech industry dynamics, but reliance on hyperscaler spending poses risks to sustained growth. The post Nvidia Q1 revenues hit record $82B, up 85% year-over-year as AI demand shows no signs of cooling appeared first… [Nvidia]

item.title: SpaceX’s IPO filing isn’t just about rockets: the prospectus points to an AI infrastructure pivot that could reshape how investors value the company
item.description: SpaceX filed an S-1 registration statement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on May 20, opening the books on a company that booked $18.7 billion in 2025 revenue and is now seeking to raise up to $80 billion at a $2 trillion valuation. If priced… [ServiceNow]

item.title: Nvidia no longer reports sales of graphics solutions as a separate segment — posts eye-watering $81.6 billion Q1 profit thanks to AI boom
item.description: Nvidia to split its revenue streams based on deployment markets rather than product segments going forward. [Nvidia]

item.title: Samsung to distribute $26.6B in bonuses to chip employees after union deal
item.description: Samsung's massive bonus payout highlights the intense competition for semiconductor talent and underscores the profitability of AI-driven demand. The post Samsung to distribute $26.6B in bonuses to chip employees after union deal appeared first on Crypto Brie… [Samsung]

item.title: X Has 550 Million Active Users, Grok’s ‘Spicy Mode’ May Cause ‘Reputational Harm’: SpaceX IPO Filing
item.description: The filing said 117 million use Grok’s AI features monthly but acknowledged the reputational risks posed by the chatbot’s “Spicy” Imagine Mode and “Unhinged” Voice Mode. [Tesla]

item.title: Nvidia says hyperscalers will keep spending on AI hardware as long as the bond market cooperates
item.description: Hyperscalers' AI hardware investments hinge on bond market conditions, potentially driving innovation in custom silicon and supplier diversification. The post Nvidia says hyperscalers will keep spending on AI hardware as long as the bond market cooperates app… [Nvidia]

item.title: Nvidia stocks jump in pre-trading as CEO Jensen Huang reveals inside information for investors. Details here
item.description: Nvidia expects revenue of $91 billion, plus or minus 2 per cent, compared with estimates of $86.84 billion, according to data compiled by LSEG. [Nvidia]

item.title: Nvidia bets on new data centre chips for growth
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang has aimed to assure investors that the world's most valuable company can keep up its blockbuster growth with the help of a broad base of customers and that new products will help it beat the $1 trillion in sales it has forecast for its… [Nvidia]
